---
title: "Problem Set 3"
subtitle: Due Friday September 26 at 5PM
editor: 
  mode: source
---

::: callout-important
## Under construction!
This assignment is not finalized. 
:::

## Problem 0

{{< include bank/_music-rec.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/axioms-conditional.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/testing-symptoms.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/bdj-encryption.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/bdj-circuit.qmd >}}

## Problem X

{{< include bank/ross-rv.qmd >}}

## Submission

{{< include bank/_submission.qmd >}}
